mapper.select: SELECT id, payment_no, order_id, order_no, user_id, pay_channel, pay_amount, pay_status, paid_at, created_at, updated_at FROM payment_record WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT id, payment_no, order_id, order_no, user_id, pay_channel, pay_amount, pay_status, paid_at, created_at, updated_at FROM payment_record WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
SELECT id, payment_no, order_id, order_no, user_id, pay_channel, pay_amount, pay_status, paid_at, created_at, updated_at FROM payment_record WHERE payment_no = #{paymentNo}
